rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside component implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings
Use assign statements only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable
Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees in component type annexes when concrete bounds or visible relations are available
Write output dependency guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type annexes
generic_rules: Use exact current-case names from the model index for all identifiers in AGREE expressions
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants
Treat each AGREE annex block as scoped to its owning component declaration
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use assume "label": expression; and guarantee "label": expression; for component type contracts
Use eq name : type = expression; and const name : type = value; for component type contracts
Use assign output = expression; for implementation contracts
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not copy identifiers from examples or invent ports/components
